da.hero_subtitle: There is a rhythm beneath all things — the heartbeat, the breath, the silence between sounds.
da.universe_desc: Omhyggeligt udvalgte SoundCloud mixes, skabt af undervisere, DJ's og producere, der udforsker krydsfeltet mellem bevægelse, åndedræt og rytme. Hvert set er designet til at fordybe din praksis, berolige dit sind og vække dine følelser.
da.behind_desc: Vores sets er ikke tilfældige playlister — de er omhyggeligt komponeret til at følge energien i en yogaklasse. En typisk klasse er struktureret som en bølge: rolig opvarmning, stigende intensitet, peak-udfordring og langsom nedstigning til shavasana. Vores musik spejler denne rejse præcist.
da.phase1_desc: Langsom, grundende musik. Hjælper dig med at ankomme og finde dit åndedræt.
da.phase2_desc: Energisk men fokuseret. Følger de mest intense sekvenser og udfordringer.
da.phase3_desc: Gradvis afslapning. Forbereder kroppen og sindet til shavasana.
da.prin1_desc: Ingen pludselige skift eller brat stilhed. Hvert track flyder naturligt over i det næste som én kontinuerlig bølge.
da.prin2_desc: Slutningen spejler begyndelsen. Vi bygger op og ned med samme intention — som ét langt, dybt åndedrag.
da.prin3_desc: Akustiske instrumenter, verdensmusik og ambient-teksturer. Aldrig aggressivt — altid støttende.
da.prin4_desc: Musikken følger dig, ikke omvendt. Den guider uden at distrahere, støtter uden at dominere.
da.creators_desc: Vores musik er skabt af undervisere, DJ's og producere, der forstår at sound design er en essentiel del af yogaoplevelsen. Hver kunstner bringer deres unikke perspektiv for at skabe rejser, der healer, energiserer og transformerer.
da.cta_text: Lyt til vores kuraterede sets og oplev forskellen.

en.hero_subtitle: There is a rhythm beneath all things — the heartbeat, the breath, the silence between sounds.
en.universe_desc: Carefully curated SoundCloud mixes, created by instructors, DJs, and producers exploring the intersection of movement, breath, and rhythm. Each set is designed to deepen your practice, calm your mind, and awaken your senses.
en.behind_desc: Our sets are not random playlists — they are carefully composed to follow the energy of a yoga class. A typical class is structured like a wave: gentle warm-up, rising intensity, peak challenge, and slow descent into shavasana. Our music mirrors this journey precisely.
en.phase1_desc: Slow, grounding music. Helps you arrive and find your breath.
en.phase2_desc: Energetic yet focused. Follows the most intense sequences and challenges.
en.phase3_desc: Gradual relaxation. Prepares body and mind for shavasana.
en.prin1_desc: No sudden shifts or abrupt silence. Each track flows naturally into the next like one continuous wave.
en.prin2_desc: The ending mirrors the beginning. We build up and down with the same intention — like one long, deep breath.
en.prin3_desc: Acoustic instruments, world music, and ambient textures. Never aggressive — always supportive.
en.prin4_desc: The music follows you, not the other way around. It guides without distracting, supports without dominating.
en.creators_desc: Our music is created by instructors, DJs, and producers who understand that sound design is an essential part of the yoga experience. Each artist brings their unique perspective to create journeys that heal, energize, and transform.
en.cta_text: Listen to our curated sets and experience the difference.
